notes: v2.4.20 - Non-Conformance: CAPA edit and implement windows now open as normal centered, solid windows; the NC edit windows (root cause, disposition, status change, customer notification, and the rest) stay on screen and scroll so Save and Submit are always reachable; cancellation reasons are captured and shown on the report detail view; and the NC analytics dashboard has been re-skinned to match the app's dark theme. Operations Intelligence: open projects whose next build is scheduled for a later date no longer disappear from the project list. Planner: linked copies let you spin off a synced copy of a task into another group on the same board (title, dates, status, assignees, and tags stay in sync, with one-click jump back and the ability to pause or unlink), and the global view can now be grouped by project manager. Time & Attendance: punch history now loads for employees whose payroll code was stored with extra spaces (TKT-00223).
